hero.title: Service, orders, and payments — in one
hero.desc: AVO helps restaurants and shared venues orchestrate hybrid service, ordering, and payment flows without replacing the systems they already use.

items.title: Staff attention delays
items.desc: Service slows down when staff attention depends on manual handoffs and visual checks.

items.title: Ordering bottlenecks
items.desc: Busy shifts expose weak points in the order flow, leading to lost revenue and frustration.

items.title: Payment friction
items.desc: The final table moment is often the slowest, stalling turnover and guest satisfaction.

items.title: Fragmented operations
items.desc: Requests, orders, and payment status are split across disconnected, legacy tools.

solution.title: AVO is the orchestration layer between the table and the operation.
solution.desc: We don't replace your POS. We make service, orders, and payment flow work together inside the operation you already run.
solution.quote: AVO replaces friction, not your core systems.

cards.title: Hybrid service
cards.label: Service Request State
cards.desc: Seamlessly switch between digital-first and staff-assisted service models based on guest preference or staff capacity.

cards.title: Integration-first
cards.label: Order Queue Logic
cards.desc: Deep hooks into your existing POS and KDS providers to enable advanced routing without complex workflow rework.

cards.title: Built for real venues
cards.label: Sync Confirmation
cards.desc: Designed for the chaos of high-volume environments, ensuring fallback-ready operations and hardware compatibility.

howItWorks.title: Orchestration in action.
howItWorks.subtitle: Guest actions become operational signals — routed, aligned, and completed in one connected flow.

steps.title: Guest initiates
steps.desc: Guest scans a QR, requests staff via a physical button, or orders directly from their mobile device.

steps.title: AVO routes the action
steps.desc: The request is instantly categorized and routed to the right screen, device, or team member in real-time.

steps.title: Staff and systems stay aligned
steps.desc: Your existing POS and KDS receive the data. Staff stay updated via wearable or handheld alerts.

steps.title: Payment and status forward
steps.desc: Payment when you're ready — starting with pay-at-counter, with table-side options where supported.

useCases.title: Versatility by design.
useCases.subtitle: Tailored orchestration for modern hospitality operators.

cards.title: Single restaurant
cards.desc: Elevate guest experience and staff efficiency in independent venues without changing your stack.

cards.title: Multi-brand operator
cards.desc: Centralize operations across diverse concepts with a single orchestration layer for consistent flow.

cards.title: Food hall orchestration
cards.desc: The ultimate challenge. Multi-vendor ordering with a single guest checkout flow.

integrations.title: Integration without interruption.
integrations.desc: AVO connects to your existing stack through adapters and fallback logic — improve flow without forcing a rip-and-replace project.
integrations.posDesc: Deep hooks into legacy systems for seamless data flow.
integrations.fallbackDesc: Built to improve flow without forcing rip-and-replace.
integrations.bannerDesc: Keep the hardware and software your staff already knows. We adapt to them, acting as the connective orchestration layer.

cta.title: Start with a focused pilot.
cta.desc: One venue, focused scope, measurable outcome. Validate the flow and measure the impact before you expand.
cta.success: Thanks for your interest, we'll be in touch!
cta.footer: Pilot timeline varies by venue and POS setup.

footer.desc: AVO orchestrates hybrid service, ordering, and payment flow for modern venue operations.
